caption:
A year stitched together with events, ideas, and impact.

From Reverse Engineering, our first big success, to the Notebook Donation Drive, which touched lives beyond our campus, each initiative taught us something new. 🌸

We explored professional growth with LinkedIn Edge, innovation at Electrovenza, skills at Crack the Network, and compassion through our Old Age Home Visit. Even our Internal Growth Project found participants from outside the team, knowledge has no boundaries. 💜

And between it all, our Team Bonding Day for the people behind WIE.

Every event was more than a gathering. It was a lesson, a milestone, and a reminder of what collaboration can create. ✨
